summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Refer & Earn system. All backend APIs (14/14 tests passed) and frontend UI components working correctly. Teacher referral endpoints return code and stats, admin endpoints manage referrers/payouts/settings, login page shows referral banner with ?ref= param, admin dashboard routes to ReferralRegistry correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/teacher/referral/my-code returns referral_code (ML format) and referral_link
Backend: GET /api/teacher/referral/my-referrals returns referrals array, total_referrals, total_earned, pending_payout
Backend: Teacher referral endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/admin/teacher-referrals returns referrers array with referees, commissions, payout_schedule
Backend: PUT /api/admin/referral-settings/payout-schedule accepts 'biweekly' and saves
Backend: PUT /api/admin/referral-settings/payout-schedule accepts 'monthly' and saves
Backend: PUT /api/admin/referral-settings/payout-schedule rejects invalid values (400)
Backend: POST /api/admin/referral-payouts records payout with referrer_id and amount
Backend: POST /api/admin/referral-payouts rejects missing referrer_id or zero amount (400)
Backend: GET /api/admin/referral-payouts returns payouts list
Backend: Admin referral endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
Backend: POST /api/auth/session accepts referral_code field for new user registration
Backend: GET /api/subscription/plans returns master (NOT enterprise)
Backend: GET /api/user/feature-access returns plan, features, lesson_usage correctly
Frontend: Login page at /login?ref=ML7A1D8E shows referral banner 'You were referred!'
Frontend: Login page stores ref code in sessionStorage
Frontend: Login page without ?ref= does NOT show referral banner
Frontend: Admin dashboard /admin/referral-registry shows ReferralRegistry component
Frontend: Admin dashboard /admin/refer-and-earn also routes to ReferralRegistry
Frontend: ReferralRegistry shows stats (Total Referrers, Total Referees, Total Commission, Pending Payouts)
Frontend: ReferralRegistry has payout schedule dropdown (biweekly/monthly) with Save button
Frontend: ReferralRegistry shows 'Referrers & Their Referees' section
Frontend: MyHub sidebar shows 'Refer & Earn' menu item with lock icon for non-master users
Frontend: Clicking locked 'Refer & Earn' shows upgrade modal (correct tier gating)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refer & Earn system fully implemented and tested. Teacher endpoints at /api/teacher/referral/* work correctly. Admin endpoints at /api/admin/teacher-referrals, /api/admin/referral-settings/*, /api/admin/referral-payouts work correctly. Login page shows referral banner when ?ref= param present and stores code in sessionStorage. AuthCallback passes referral_code to /api/auth/session. Admin ReferralRegistry component accessible at both /admin/referral-registry and /admin/refer-and-earn routes. TeacherReferAndEarn component is correctly gated to 'master' plan only (shows upgrade modal for premium users).

backend_api.teacher_referral_my_referrals: Returns referrals array with name, email, plan, commission_per_cycle, total_paid, joined
backend_api.admin_teacher_referrals: Returns referrers with referees, total_commission, total_paid, pending, referee_count, payout_schedule
backend_api.admin_referral_payouts: Records payouts with payout_id, referrer_id, amount, created_at
backend_api.auth_session_referral: Accepts referral_code field for new user registration

frontend_ui.login_referral_banner: Shows 'You were referred!' banner when ?ref= param present
frontend_ui.login_sessionStorage: Stores referral code in sessionStorage for AuthCallback
frontend_ui.admin_referral_registry: Shows stats, payout settings, referrers list with all data-testids
frontend_ui.teacher_refer_earn_gating: Correctly gated to master plan, shows upgrade modal for premium users
